title: Name Tag Entity Health Indicator
description: This is a simple Fabric mod, that displays the health of entities via text over their head (toggleable).
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️**

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

<hr>

**Name Tag Entity Health Indicator** is a simple client-sided Minecraft mod for the **Fabric Loader**, that displays the health of entities by showing text over their head, containing info about their HP (using a bar made of 20 "|" symbols, and a number). The whole mod is toggleable with this command that the mod adds: **/togglehealthlabels**.

For a visual of this mod, please visit this mod's **[Gallery Tab](https://modrinth.com/mod/name-tag-entity-health-indicator/gallery)**.

<hr>

**Donation**

If you like my work, and would like support me, then please consider to donate [here](https://paypal.com/paypalme/EdwardKhrabrov) (or with another link on the side bar, under "Links").
